common.siteDescription: AI-powered mock interview practice for frontend engineers
common.errorNetwork: A network or server error occurred. Please try again later.

auth.description: Please {mode} to save your learning progress.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please check your inbox.
auth.successEmailSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.

landing.heroDescription:
AI-powered technical learning and mock interview practice for frontend engineers.
Start by identifying what you know and what you don't.
landing.featureMetacognitionDesc: Identify what you know and don't know, and visually pinpoint your weak areas.
landing.featureCurriculumDesc: Learn 151 core concepts across 9 categories step by step.
landing.featureFrontendDesc: Covering core frontend topics: HTML, CSS, JS, React, Next.js, and more.
landing.footer: AI Interview — A new way to prepare for frontend interviews

diagnosis.metaDescription: Identify your weak areas with key questions across 9 categories.
diagnosis.title: Metacognition Diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Answer key questions across 9 categories to identify your weak areas.
diagnosis.guide1: A total of {count} key questions are presented, one per category.
diagnosis.guide3: Review your weak categories in the results and start learning.
diagnosis.note: * This is not a test. It's a metacognition diagnosis where you judge whether you can answer each question.
diagnosis.selfCheck: Judge whether you could answer this in an interview.
diagnosis.answerVagueDesc: I've heard of it but can't explain clearly
diagnosis.answerUnknownDesc: Never heard of it or can't answer at all
diagnosis.weakCategoryGuide: Focus on learning these categories first for better efficiency.

map.metaDescription: Visualize your understanding across all concepts
map.title: Weakness Map
map.progressDescription: {completed} of {total} completed. Focus on your weak areas.
map.noProgressDescription: Log in and start learning to see your progress reflected here.
